testcase.name: test_admin_control_room

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('total_leads' in {'current_month': 'February 2026', 'generated_at': '2026-02-28T16:56:55.874920+00:00', 'metrics': {'active_tentative_holds': 9, 'bmv_commission_current_month': 93000.0, 'confirmed_bookings_current_month': 8, 'confirmed_gmv_current_month': 5000000.0, ...}, 'monthly_gmv_trend': [{'bookings': 0, 'commission': 0, 'gmv': 0, 'month': 'Sep', ...}, {'bookings': 0, 'commission': 0, 'gmv': 0, 'month': 'Oct', ...}, {'bookings': 0, 'commission': 0, 'gmv': 0, 'month': 'Nov', ...}, {'bookings': 0, 'commission': 0, 'gmv': 0, 'month': 'Dec', ...}, {'bookings': 0, 'commission': 0, 'gmv': 0, 'month': 'Jan', ...}, {'bookings': 8, 'commission': 93000.0, 'gmv': 5000000.0, 'month': 'Feb', ...}], ...} or 'active_leads' in {'current_month': 'February 2026', 'generated_at': '2026-02-28T16:56:55.874920+00:00', 'metrics': {'active_tentative_holds': 9, 'bmv_commission_current_month': 93000.0, 'confirmed_bookings_current_month': 8, 'confirmed_gmv_current_month': 5000000.0, ...}, 'monthly_gmv_trend': [{'bookings': 0, 'commission': 0, 'gmv': 0, 'month': 'Sep', ...}, {'bookings': 0, 'commission': 0, 'gmv': 0, 'month': 'Oct', ...}, {'bookings': 0, 'commission': 0, 'gmv': 0, 'month': 'Nov', ...}, {'bookings': 0, 'commission': 0, 'gmv': 0, 'month': 'Dec', ...}, {'bookings': 0, 'commission': 0, 'gmv': 0, 'month': 'Jan', ...}, {'bookings': 8, 'commission': 93000.0, 'gmv': 5000000.0, 'month': 'Feb', ...}], ...} or 'kpis' in {'current_month': 'February 2026', 'generated_at': '2026-02-28T16:56:55.874920+00:00', 'metrics': {'active_tentative_holds': 9, 'bmv_commission_current_month': 93000.0, 'confirmed_bookings_current_month': 8, 'confirmed_gmv_current_month': 5000000.0, ...}, 'monthly_gmv_trend': [{'bookings': 0, 'commission': 0, 'gmv': 0, 'month': 'Sep', ...}, {'bookings': 0, 'commission': 0, 'gmv': 0, 'month': 'Oct', ...}, {'bookings': 0, 'commission': 0, 'gmv': 0, testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comparison_sheets_regression.py:407: in test_admin_control_room assert "total_leads" in data or "active_leads" in data or "kpis" in data E AssertionError: assert
